evals.prompt: I have three PDF files: part1.pdf, part2.pdf, and part3.pdf. Can you merge them into a single file called combined.pdf?
evals.expected_output: Should use PyMuPDF to merge the three PDFs in order using insert_pdf(), save as combined.pdf, and report the total page count

evals.prompt: I need to add a 'CONFIDENTIAL' watermark to every page of my report.pdf file.
evals.expected_output: Should use PyMuPDF to add diagonal semi-transparent text watermark 'CONFIDENTIAL' to each page and save to a new file

evals.prompt: Can you encrypt my document.pdf with a password so only authorized people can open it?
evals.expected_output: Should use PyMuPDF with AES-256 encryption, set user and owner passwords, configure appropriate permissions, and save the encrypted file
